headline: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM): An Affordable Growth Pick With Strong Momentum and Financial Health
summary: DexCom (DXCM) fits the Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP) strategy, offering strong earnings growth, reasonable valuation, and solid financial health as an affordable growth stock.
